simple_types.name: primitive_Kind
simple_types.code:
type primitive_Kind is (Unknown,
                        Lines,     line_Strips,
                        Polygons,  polyList,
                        Triangles, triFans,     triStrips);

array_types.name: Geometry_array
array_types.code: type Geometry_array is array (Positive range <>) of Geometry;

array_types.name: int_array_List
array_types.code: type int_array_List is array (Positive range <>) of access int_array;

array_types.name: Primitives
array_types.code: type Primitives is array (Positive range <>) of Primitive;

record_types.name: Geometry
Item
Mesh
Primitive
Vertices

subprograms.name: coord_Offset_of
subprograms.code: function  coord_Offset_of (Self : in Primitive) return math.Index

subprograms.name: Coords_of
subprograms.code:
function Coords_of    (Self          : in Mesh;
                       for_Primitive : in Primitive) return access float_Array

subprograms.name: normal_Offset_of
subprograms.code: function normal_Offset_of (Self : in Primitive) return math.Index

subprograms.name: Normals_of
subprograms.code:
function Normals_of   (Self          : in Mesh;
                       for_Primitive : in Primitive) return access float_Array

subprograms.name: Positions_of
subprograms.code: function Positions_of (Self          : in Mesh)      return access float_Array

subprograms.name: Source_of
subprograms.code:
function Source_of    (Self          : in Mesh;
                       source_Name   : in String)    return Source

subprograms.name: vertex_Offset_of
subprograms.code: function vertex_Offset_of (Self : in Primitive) return math.Index
